title: mentha strobilifera
intro: Mentha strobilifera, also known as Japanese mint or Korean mint, is a species of mint plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha strobilifera include its potential to alleviate nausea, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Mentha strobilifera is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
